transactions: April 15, 1992:Signed by theMinnesota Twinsas an amateur free agent.

March 24, 1994:theMinnesota TwinssentEnrique Wilsonto theCleveland Indiansto complete an earlier deal made on February 21, 1994.February 21, 1994: TheMinnesota Twinssent a player to be named later to theCleveland IndiansforShawn Bryant(minors).
